page_metadata.biotools__summary: ChemFOnt (the Chemical Functional Ontology) is a hierarchical, OWL-compatible ontology describing the functions and actions of more than 341,000 biologically important chemicals.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ChemFOnt (the Chemical Functional Ontology) is a hierarchical, OWL-compatible ontology describing the functions and actions of more than 341,000 biologically important chemicals.
